title: Scoring further slice 038 — factors/rank-core/id-graph
description: ISS-038: plan-context-scoring.ts ~802 LOC 仍混合 context build、fusion factors、rank/cut、relatedLookupKeys。在 TASK-003 SSOT 后继续切片：score-factors / rank-core / id-graph，保留 buildScoringContext 为装配函数，plan-context facade 公开 re-export 不变。
action: After TASK-003, extract from plan-context-scoring.ts into sibling modules under packages/server/src/services/: (1) plan-context-score-factors.ts — salienceScore/contentScore/recencyBoost/localityBoost/credibilityFactor/scoreDescriptionItem/scoreBreakdownForItem + locality helpers; (2) plan-context-rank-core.ts OR keep rank helpers in scoring but ensure cut/rankDescriptionItems/sortDescriptionItems live with rank concerns without redefining types; (3) move relatedLookupKeys to plan-context-ids.ts if not already there (id-graph). Keep export async function buildScoringContext and type ScoringContext assembly in plan-context-scoring.ts or thin re-export. packages/server/src/services/plan-context.ts public exports (buildScoringContext, cutRankedForRecall, rankDescriptionItems if any, scoreBreakdownForItem, relatedLookupKeys, RankMode, RankOptions, ScoringContext) must remain importable from plan-context.js.

criteria: packages/server/src/services/plan-context-scoring.ts line count is substantially below pre-slice ~802 (target ≤550 or clear module split with ≥2 new sibling files owning factor/id helpers)
New or existing modules own score factor functions and relatedLookupKeys without behavior change (scoreBreakdownForItem vs fused score agreement tests still pass)

rg -n 'export (async )?function (buildScoringContext|cutRankedForRecall|scoreBreakdownForItem|relatedLookupKeys)|export type (ScoringContext|RankMode|RankOptions)' packages/server/src/services/plan-context.ts still shows facade re-exports
No duplicate RankMode/RankOptions definitions reintroduced in scoring

pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server exec vitest run src/services/plan-context.test.ts src/services/plan-context-scope-rank.test.ts src/services/plan-context-shadow-ranker.test.ts src/services/selection-token-cache.test.ts src/services/compare-stable-ids.test.ts src/services/recall.test.ts exits 0
convergence.verification: wc -l plan-context-scoring.ts + new modules; vitest suite above; tsc --noEmit; confirm plan-context public API imports
convergence.definition_of_done: scoring god-module 进一步按 concern 切片；buildScoringContext 仍为装配；facade 稳定；ISS-038 close 或留下精确 residual LOC gap（禁止 false-close）。

files.target: buildScoringContext assembly; re-export moved symbols as needed
files.change: Thin to context assembly + wiring; remove inlined factor/id bodies after extract
Move or re-export relatedLookupKeys as id-graph helper if not already present; keep compareStableIds cohesion
Update import paths if symbols moved; preserve export names for callers

implementation: Map current scoring.ts regions: ScoringContext+buildScoringContext (~43-257), proximity/sort (~258-370), rank/cut (~374-430), factors/breakdown (~536-795), relatedLookupKeys (~797+)
Create plan-context-score-factors.ts with pure factor functions and scoreBreakdownForItem; import ScoringContext type only

Move relatedLookupKeys into plan-context-ids.ts (or dedicated small id-graph file re-exported from ids) and update scoring/recall/plan-context imports — note recall.ts may have a private relatedLookupKeys; do not blindly merge unless identical, prefer shared export if safe
Keep buildScoringContext in scoring module as assembly; rankDescriptionItems/cutRankedForRecall remain exported from scoring (post-003 thin cut) or rank-core without type redefs
Update plan-context.ts re-exports only as needed; run full plan-context + recall vitest + tsc
If time-box prevents complete factor extract, ship partial extract with residual LOC noted — do not claim full close

commands: pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server exec vitest run src/services/plan-context.test.ts src/services/plan-context-scope-rank.test.ts src/services/plan-context-shadow-ranker.test.ts src/services/selection-token-cache.test.ts src/services/compare-stable-ids.test.ts src/services/recall.test.ts
success_metrics: scoring.ts thinner or multi-module split evident

reference.pattern: ISS-011 first slice: facade + scoring/selection/bm25/doc-text modules; continue same style

rationale.chosen_approach: Vertical concern extract after rank SSOT prevents re-copying cut/types into new modules
decision_factors: 802 LOC secondary god module residual after 011
rationale.tradeoffs: Multiple small files vs one scoring file — prefer 2-3 focused modules over micro-files

risks: scoreBreakdownForItem must stay bit-identical to fused score path (recall tests guard)
import cycles between scoring and factors
private relatedLookupKeys in recall.ts may diverge — verify before forced share
